assertions.text: Recognizes auditEvent as a transactional / continuously-growing table
Flags the missing time/date window (no bound on createdAt) and recommends one on an indexed column
Flags the absence of a take/limit (unbounded result set) and recommends pagination (cursor/keyset or take)
Flags over-fetching via include (user + metadata) and recommends selecting only needed fields
States a tradeoff for at least one recommendation (not just the fix)
